title: Death Coords
description: Sends the death coordinates to the player when they die
body:
# Death Coords 💀
A really simple datapack that sends the death coordinates to the player when they die.

## How To Install
Just add the datapack to the world and it should work right away. Alternatively, this datapack is also packaged as a mod, so you can easily install it by using your favorite mod loader!

## How To Uninstall
To completely remove the datapack (with no leftovers), first execute `/function death_coords:uninstall` and then delete the datapack/mod.
